steps.title: Match input to output
steps.content: For an ordered pair that satisfies $y=f(x)$, the first coordinate is the input and the second coordinate is the output.

steps.title: Read the function value
steps.content: The pair $(6,4)$ means that when the input is $6$, the output is $4$. Therefore, $f(6)=4$. The answer is A.
